title: Record complexity repayment for the Installed Lifecycle execution plan
outOfScope: 生产代码、测试逻辑、Makefile、CI Workflow 和历史归档内容的重写
删除或隐藏复杂度指标、跳过复杂度检查、或直接修改当前计划 PR 的内容

declaredIntent.summary: Record a narrow, auditable complexity-budget repayment so the reviewed Installed Lifecycle execution plan PR can pass blocking governance checks.

sources.reason: Current CI failure is caused by markdownLines and archiveGrowth limits being below the repository shape introduced by the current plan PR.
Defines the required repaymentRecords evidence for any threshold increase.
Observed failure: markdownLines=8574 exceeds 8300 and archiveGrowth=402 exceeds 401.
Updated Work Item Contract for the focused governance-policy change.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The policy records a repayment entry for each increased limit
scenarioCoverage.reason: Threshold increases must remain auditable and fail closed without repayment metadata.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The current plan PR shape passes complexity validation after the focused budget update
scenarioCoverage.reason: The two failing metrics are known and bounded by the requested policy update.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No complexity metric is removed or made observational-only by this change
scenarioCoverage.reason: The change preserves all existing metric keys and blocking behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: The change increases two explicit governance limits only to accommodate the reviewed plan PR and records repayment metadata for both increases.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized governance configuration changes and the complete current-document PR workflow.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm only the two observed limit increases and their repayment records; do not broaden the policy change.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The governance complexity policy raises markdownLines from 8300 to 8600 and archiveGrowth from 401 to 402, covering the measured current plan PR values markdownLines=8574 and archiveGrowth=402.
The policy adds a repaymentRecords entry for both increases with prior limit, new limit, owner, due date, and concrete reduction plan.

make check-governance-complexity passes with the existing pythonLines, markdownLines, testLines, shellLines, workflowLines, and archiveGrowth metric keys present and blocking; the full declared AI Cockpit and project quality checks are then recorded by ai-finish.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: PR #196 cannot merge because the current governance complexity limits reject the plan's measured markdown size and the next immutable archive entry.
constraints: Change only the two observed policy limits and their repayment records.
Keep all complexity metrics blocking and keep archive/index integrity checks unchanged.
Do not modify or delete the current plan PR content as a workaround.
intent.rationale: The failure is a governance-budget mismatch, not a reason to bypass CI; a narrow, auditable budget adjustment lets the already-reviewed plan proceed while retaining a concrete repayment obligation.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized completing the current document workflow, including governance configuration, PR, merge, closure, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
